home.about_desc: Founded in 2004, SHD Casting is a professional casting manufacturer integrating R&D, production and sales, located in Shanghai Fengxian Industrial Zone with an area of about 50,000 square meters.
home.about_desc2: With advanced casting production lines and testing equipment, our annual capacity exceeds 50,000 tons. Our products are widely used in construction machinery, automotive, power equipment, pump & valve industries, and exported to over 30 countries in Europe, America and Southeast Asia.
home.hero_tag: Professional Casting Manufacturer · 20 Years of Quality Assurance
home.factory_desc: Total area of 50,000 square meters with multiple automated casting production lines, equipped with advanced CMM, spectrometers and other precision testing equipment.
home.check_2: Complete casting, machining and heat treatment production lines
home.check_3: Professional R&D team for customized design services
home.check_4: Strict factory inspection ensuring 100% qualification rate
